scope: Normalize vehicle availability, new/used/black-market/estimated pricing, and store-facing sale flags without touching transport or combat stats.
authority: Existing compendium source-extracted cost lines plus targeted SWSE Fandom statblock verification for high-risk ambiguous records.

remainingReviewItems.name: Hyperspace Beacon
notes: Normalized exact new/used price pair from existing source-extracted statblock cost line.

notes: Recovered comma-truncated used price token 6 against new price 70,000 -> 60,000.

Ambiguous one-digit/two-digit extracted costs were not broadly guessed; only verified examples or clear recovered comma truncations were changed.
system.cost remains the authoritative store price field. costNumeric is cleared for vehicles so packed helper values cannot be misread as scalar costs.
vehicleStoreCanBuyNew/vehicleStoreCanBuyUsed flags let store UI distinguish public pricing, used-only, black-market-used-only, and unavailable vehicles.
